text:
Medicare Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
DRUG_COMBINED_EVER Drug Use Disorders - Combined Medicare & Medicaid Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
DRUG_MEDICARE_EVER Drug Use Disorders - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
DRUG_MEDICAID_EVER Drug Use Disorders -Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
FIBRO_COMBINED Fibromyalgia, Chronic Pain and
